item.sapphire-star-armaments.iron_glaive: The first Insect Glaive, forged using  ores from these lands.
Allows it's user to engage in aerial combat.
Empowered by essence with a Kinsect on the off-hand.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.diamond_gla: A sharper and sturdier Insect Glaive,
forged using one of the strongest materials from these lands.
Allows it's user to engage in aerial combat.
Empowered by essence with a Kinsect on the off-hand.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.netherite_g: The strongest Insect Glaive this land and neighboring
Allows it's user to engage in aerial combat.
Empowered by essence with a Kinsect on the off-hand.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.phantom_gla: An Insect Glaive that feels impossibly light,
making it nimbler and faster that any other.
Allows it's user to engage in aerial combat.
Empowered by essence with a Kinsect on the off-hand.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.spider_glai: An Insect Glaive forged channeling the primal strengths
of arachnids, spreading a venomous blight on it's adversaries.
Allows it's user to engage in aerial combat.
Empowered by essence with a Kinsect on the off-hand.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.blaze_glaiv: A fiery Insect Glaive, wielding hell-spawned power,
setting ablaze whatever comes its way.
Allows it's user to engage in aerial combat.
Empowered by essence with a Kinsect on the off-hand.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.primal_glan: A strong venom sac harvested from a Spider.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.arachnid_hi: Tough, bristly skin that can be woven into gear.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.preserved_e: A fresh eye that seems to follow your movements.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.spectral_sp: A lightweight spine that barely holds physical form.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.ghostly_win: You can't feel it's texture, but it's cold to the touch.
The swirling night sky can be seen inside of it.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.warm_ash.de: Ashes left by a Blaze, who even after death, gives it warmth.
item.sapphire-star-armaments.ignition_ro: Lightweight and sturdy, you can tell it's about to catch fire.
A fragment of fire, said to be what drives a Blaze.
